name: Player Bug Report Categorizer
description: SE445 HW1 – Webhook pipeline that receives player bug reports, processes them, generates an AI summary, and logs results to Google Sheets.

nodes.description: Receives HTTP POST requests at /webhook/bug-report with player_id, game_version, and bug_description fields
Trims whitespace from all string fields, validates bug_description is longer than 10 characters, generates an ISO-8601 UTC timestamp
Calls the Google Gemini API (gemini-2.5-flash) to generate a professional 10-word technical summary of the bug report

parameters.system_prompt: Act as a Lead QA Tester. Summarize this player bug report into a professional, exactly 10-word technical summary.

nodes.description: Authenticates via OAuth and appends a new row to the 'SE445_Bug_Reports' Google Sheet containing timestamp, player_id, game_version, raw description, and AI summary
